description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node Docker image and a before_script that runs apt-get update, apt-get install -y gettext, node --version, npm --version, and npm ci || npm install for all jobs. Define a single stage named pack. Add a package job in the pack stage that executes npm pack, stores the resulting *.tgz files as artifacts, and is configured to skip runs on tag pipelines (except tags).
